debug_info.goal:
U V : Type
h : U ∼ V
⊢ Set U ∼ Set V

failed_attempts:
by
  rcases h with ⟨f, hf, h1⟩
  use (fun s ↦ f '' s)
  constructor
  · -- Show injectivity
    intro s1 s2 h
    ext x
    simp at h ⊢
    have h2 : f.Injective := by
      exact hf.1
    have h3 : x ∈ s1 ↔ x ∈ s2 := by
      constructor
      · -- Assume x ∈ s1
        intro hx
        have h4 : f x ∈ f '' s1 := by
          simp [hx]
        have h5 : f x ∈ f '' s2 := by
          rw [h] at h4
          exact h4
        rcases h5 with ⟨y, hy, h6⟩
        have h7 : y = x := by
          apply h2
          all_goals
            try tauto
            try exact h6
        rw [h7] at hy
        tauto
      · -- Assume x ∈ s2
        intro hx
        have h4 : f x ∈ f '' s2 := by
          simp [hx]
        have h5 : f x ∈ f '' s1 := by
          rw [h] at h4
          exact h4
        rcases h5 with ⟨y, hy, h6⟩
        have h7 : y = x := by
          apply h2
          all_goals
            try tauto
            try exact h6
        rw [h7] at hy
        tauto
    tauto
  · -- Show surjectivity
    intro s
    use (f ⁻¹ '' s)
    ext x
    simp
    <;> aesop
    all_goals
      try tauto
      try aesop
      try tauto

by
  rcases h with ⟨f, g, hf, hg⟩
  use (fun s => f '' s)
  use (fun t => g '' t)
  constructor
  · -- Show that h ∘ k = id
    funext t
    ext x
    simp [Function.comp_apply]
    have h1 : f ∘ g = id := hf
    have h2 : g ∘ f = id := hg
    have h3 : ∀ x, f (g x) = x := by
      intro x
      simpa using congr_fun h1 x
    have h4 : ∀ x, g (f x) = x := by
      intro x
      simpa using congr_fun h2 x
    constructor
    · -- Assume x ∈ f '' (g '' t)
      rintro ⟨y, hy, hxy⟩
      rcases hy with ⟨z, hz, hgy⟩
      have h5 : f (g z) = x := by
        rw [show g z = y by exact hgy] at *
        linarith
      have h6 : f (g z) = z := h3 z
      have h7 : z = x := by
        linarith [h5, h6]
      rw [h7] at hz
      exact hz
    · -- Assume x ∈ t
      intro hx
      refine ⟨g x, ?_, ?_⟩
      · -- Show g x ∈ g '' t
        use x
        all_goals
          simp at *
          all_goals tauto
      · -- Show f (g x) = x
        have h8 : f (g x) = x := h3 x
        simpa using h8
  · -- Show that k ∘ h = id
    funext s
    ext x
    simp [Function.comp_apply]
    have h1 : f ∘ g = id := hf
    have h2 : g ∘ f = id := hg
    have h3 : ∀ x, f (g x) = x := by
      intro x
      simpa using congr_fun h1 x
    have h4 : ∀ x, g (f x) = x := by
      intro x
      simpa using congr_fun h2 x
    constructor
    · -- Assume x ∈ g '' (f '' s)
      rintro ⟨y, hy, hxy⟩
      rcases hy with ⟨z, hz, hfy⟩
      have h5 : g (f z) = x := by
        rw [show f z = y by exact hfy] at *
        linarith
      have h6 : g (f z) = z := h4 z
      have h7 : z = x := by
        linarith [h5, h6]
      rw [h7] at hz
      exact hz
    · -- Assume x ∈ s
      intro hx
      refine ⟨f x, ?_, ?_⟩
      · -- Show f x ∈ f '' s
        use x
        all_goals
          simp at *
          all_goals tauto
      · -- Show g (f x) = x
        have h8 : g (f x) = x := h4 x
        simpa using h8

by
  obtain ⟨f, g, h1, h2⟩ := h
  use image f, image g
  all_goals
    simp_all [Function.comp_apply, Set.image_comp, h1, h2]

by
  rcases h with ⟨f, hf⟩
  use (fun A => {f a | a ∈ A})
  constructor
  · -- Show F is injective
    intro A B hAB
    have h1 : ∀ v, v ∈ {f a | a ∈ A} ↔ v ∈ {f a | a ∈ B} := by
      rw [hAB]
      all_goals simp
    have h2 : ∀ a, a ∈ A ↔ a ∈ B := by
      intro a
      have h3 : f a ∈ {f a | a ∈ A} := by
        simp
      have h4 : f a ∈ {f a | a ∈ B} := h1 (f a)
      simp at h4 ⊢
      rcases h4 with ⟨b, hb, hfb⟩
      have h5 : b = a := by
        have h6 : f b = f a := hfb
        have h7 : b = a := by
          apply f.injective
          exact h6
        exact h7
      have h8 : a ∈ B := by 
        rw [h5] at hb
        exact hb
      tauto
    have h3 : A = B := by
      ext a
      simp [h2 a]
    exact h3
  · -- Show F is surjective
    intro C
    use {u | f u ∈ C}
    ext w
    simp
    constructor
    · -- Assume ∃ u, f u ∈ C ∧ f u = w, prove w ∈ C
      rintro ⟨u, hu, hw⟩
      rw [hw] at hu
      exact hu
    · -- Assume w ∈ C, prove ∃ u, f u ∈ C ∧ f u = w
      intro hw
      have h8 : ∃ u, f u = w := f.surjective w
      rcases h8 with ⟨u, hu⟩
      refine ⟨u, by 
        rw [hu]
        exact hw
      , hu⟩

by
  obtain ⟨f, g, hf, hg⟩ := h
  use fun A => f '' A
  use fun B => g '' B
  constructor
  · -- Show that for any A ⊆ U, f '' A ⊆ V and g '' (f '' A) = A
    intro A
    ext x
    simp [Set.mem_image]
    constructor
    · -- Show that if x ∈ g '' (f '' A), then x ∈ A
      rintro ⟨y, ⟨z, hz, h1⟩, h2⟩ 
      have h3 : g (f z) = z := by 
        simpa using congr_fun hg z 
      have h4 : y = f z := by 
        simpa using h1 
      rw [h4] at h2 
      rw [h3] at h2 
      exact hz 
    · -- Show that if x ∈ A, then x ∈ g '' (f '' A)
      intro h 
      refine ⟨f x, ⟨x, h, rfl⟩, by 
        simpa using congr_fun hg x 
      ⟩ 
  · -- Show that for any B ⊆ V, g '' B ⊆ U and f '' (g '' B) = B
    intro B
    ext x
    simp [Set.mem_image]
    constructor
    · -- Show that if x ∈ f '' (g '' B), then x ∈ B
      rintro ⟨y, ⟨z, hz, h1⟩, h2⟩ 
      have h3 : f (g z) = z := by 
        simpa using congr_fun hf z 
      have h4 : y = g z := by 
        simpa using h1 
      rw [h4] at h2 
      rw [h3] at h2 
      exact hz 
    · -- Show that if x ∈ B, then x ∈ f '' (g '' B)
      intro h 
      refine ⟨g x, ⟨x, h, rfl⟩, by 
        simpa using congr_fun hf x 
      ⟩

  obtain ⟨f, g, hf, hg⟩ := h

  all_goals

    ext x 
    simp 
    <;> try { 
      have h3 : ∀ (v : U), f (g v) = v := by 
        intro v 
        simpa using congr_fun h1 v 
      have h4 : ∀ (v : U), f (g v) = v := h3 
      constructor

        rintro ⟨u, hu, rfl⟩ 
        rcases hu with ⟨v, hv, rfl⟩ 
        have h5 : v ∈ s := hv 
        have h6 : f (g v) = v := h4 v 
        have h7 : x = v := by 
          linarith [h6] 
        rw [h7] 
        exact h5 
      · -- Assume x ∈ s 
        intro hx 
        have h8 : x ∈ s := hx 
        refine ⟨g x, ?_, ?_⟩ 
        · -- Show g x ∈ {g v | v ∈ s} 
          refine ⟨x, h8, rfl⟩ 
        · -- Show f (g x) = x 
          exact h4 x 
    } 
    <;> try { 
      have h3 : ∀ (u : U), g (f u) = u := by 
        intro u 
        simpa using congr_fun h2 u 
      have h4 : ∀ (u : U), g (f u) = u := h3 
      constructor 
      · -- Assume x ∈ {g v | v ∈ {f u | u ∈ s}} 
        rintro ⟨v, hv, rfl⟩ 
        rcases hv with ⟨u, hu, rfl⟩ 
        have h5 : u ∈ s := hu 
        have h6 : g (f u) = u := h4 u 
        have h7 : x = u := by 
          linarith [h6] 
        rw [h7] 
        exact h5 
      · -- Assume x ∈ s 
        intro hx 
        have h8 : x ∈ s := hx 
        refine ⟨f x, ?_, ?_⟩ 
        · -- Show f x ∈ {f u | u ∈ s} 
          refine ⟨x, h8, rfl⟩ 
        · -- Show g (f x) = x 
          exact h4 x 
    }

by
  rcases h with ⟨f, hf, hfx⟩
  use fun s => f '' s
  constructor
  · -- Show F is injective
    intro s1 s2 h12
    have h_inj : Function.Injective f := hf.1
    have h_surj : Function.Surjective f := hf.2
    ext x
    simp [Set.mem_image] at h12 ⊢
    constructor
    · -- Show x ∈ s1 → x ∈ s2
      intro hx
      have hfx2 : f x ∈ f '' s2 := by 
        rw [show f '' s1 = f '' s2 by tauto] at *
        exact hx
      rcases hfx2 with ⟨y, hy, hfy⟩
      have h_eq : x = y := by 
        apply h_inj
        exact hfy
      rw [h_eq] at hy
      exact hy
    · -- Show x ∈ s2 → x ∈ s1
      intro hx
      have hfx1 : f x ∈ f '' s1 := by 
        rw [show f '' s1 = f '' s2 by tauto] at *
        exact hx
      rcases hfx1 with ⟨y, hy, hfy⟩
      have h_eq : x = y := by 
        apply h_inj
        exact hfy
      rw [h_eq] at hy
      exact hy
  · -- Show F is surjective
    intro t
    use f⁻¹ '' t
    have h_inj : Function.Injective f := hf.1
    have h_surj : Function.Surjective f := hf.2
    ext y
    simp [Set.mem_image, Set.mem_preimage]
    constructor
    · -- Show y ∈ f '' (f⁻¹ '' t) → y ∈ t
      rintro ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩
      have hfx_in_t : f x ∈ t := by 
        simpa using hx
      exact hfx_in_t
    · -- Show y ∈ t → y ∈ f '' (f⁻¹ '' t)
      intro hy
      have h4 : ∃ x, f x = y := h_surj y
      rcases h4 with ⟨x, hx⟩
      refine ⟨x, by 
        simp [Set.mem_preimage]
        tauto
      , by 
        exact hx
      ⟩

          all_goals
            simpa using hfy
        rw [h6] at hy
        exact hy

        have h5 : f x ∈ f '' A1 := by
          rw [show f '' A2 = f '' A1 by rw [h_eq]] at h4
          exact h4
        rcases h5 with ⟨y, hy, hfy⟩
        have h6 : y = x := by
          apply h1
          all_goals
            simpa using hfy

by
  rcases h with ⟨f, g, hf, hg⟩
  use fun A => f '' A
  constructor
  · -- Show that for any A ⊆ U, f(A) ⊆ V
    intro A hA
    simp at hA ⊢
    tauto
  constructor
  · -- Show that F is injective
    intros A hA B hB hAB
    ext x
    simp at hAB ⊢
    constructor
    · -- Assume x ∈ A
      intro hx
      have h1 : f x ∈ (f '' A) := by
        simpa using hx
      have h2 : f x ∈ (f '' B) := by
        rw [show (f '' A) = (f '' B) by tauto] at h1
        exact h1
      rcases h2 with ⟨y, hy, hfy⟩
      have h3 : y = x := by
        have h4 : f y = f x := by
          linarith [hfy]
        have h5 : g (f y) = g (f x) := by
          rw [h4]
        have h6 : g (f y) = y := by
          apply hg
        have h7 : g (f x) = x := by
          apply hg
        linarith [h5, h6, h7]
      have h8 : x ∈ B := by
        rw [show y = x by linarith [h3]] at hy
        exact hy
      exact h8
    · -- Assume x ∈ B
      intro hx
      have h1 : f x ∈ (f '' B) := by
        simpa using hx
      have h2 : f x ∈ (f '' A) := by
        rw [show (f '' A) = (f '' B) by tauto] at *
        exact h1
      rcases h2 with ⟨y, hy, hfy⟩
      have h3 : y = x := by
        have h4 : f y = f x := by
          linarith [hfy]
        have h5 : g (f y) = g (f x) := by
          rw [h4]
        have h6 : g (f y) = y := by
          apply hg
        have h7 : g (f x) = x := by
          apply hg
        linarith [h5, h6, h7]
      have h8 : x ∈ A := by
        rw [show y = x by linarith [h3]] at hy
        exact hy
      exact h8
  · -- Show that F is surjective
    intro B hB
    use {u : U | f u ∈ B}
    constructor
    · -- Show that {u : U | f u ∈ B} ⊆ U
      intro u hu
      simp at hu ⊢
      tauto
    · -- Show that f '' {u : U | f u ∈ B} = B
      ext v
      simp
      constructor
      · -- Assume v ∈ f '' {u : U | f u ∈ B}
        intro h
        rcases h with ⟨u, hu, hfu⟩
        have h1 : f u ∈ B := by
          simpa using hu
        rw [show f u = v by linarith [hfu]] at h1
        exact h1
      · -- Assume v ∈ B
        intro h
        have h2 : ∃ u : U, f u = v := by
          use g v
          all_goals
            simp [hg]
        rcases h2 with ⟨u, hu⟩
        refine ⟨u, by simp [hu, h]⟩

by
  rcases h with ⟨f, g, h1, h2⟩
  use (fun s => f '' s)
  use (fun t => g '' t)
  constructor
  · -- Show that (fun s => f '' s) is left inverse of (fun t => g '' t)
    intro s
    ext x
    simp
    <;> simp [Set.mem_image, Set.mem_setOf_eq, h1, h2]
    <;> aesop
  · -- Show that (fun s => f '' s) is right inverse of (fun t => g '' t)
    intro t
    ext x
    simp
    <;> simp [Set.mem_image, Set.mem_setOf_eq, h1, h2]
    <;> aesop

-- Let f be the bijection from U to V
  rcases h with ⟨f, hf, h1⟩
  -- Define the map F: P(U) → P(V) as F(A) = {f(a) | a ∈ A}
  use fun A => image f A
  constructor
  · -- Show F is injective
    intro A1 A2 h_eq
    have h_inj : A1 = A2 := by
      ext a
      simp at h_eq ⊢
      constructor
      · -- Assume a ∈ A1, need to show a ∈ A2
        intro ha
        have hfa : f a ∈ image f A1 := by simp [ha]
        have hfa2 : f a ∈ image f A2 := by rw [h_eq] at hfa; exact hfa
        rcases hfa2 with ⟨b, hb, hfb⟩
        have h_inj' : b = a := by
          apply hf.1
          exact hfb
        rw [h_inj'] at hb
        exact hb
      · -- Assume a ∈ A2, need to show a ∈ A1
        intro ha
        have hfa : f a ∈ image f A2 := by simp [ha]
        have hfa1 : f a ∈ image f A1 := by rw [←h_eq] at hfa; exact hfa
        rcases hfa1 with ⟨b, hb, hfb⟩
        have h_inj' : b = a := by
          apply hf.1
          exact hfb
        rw [h_inj'] at hb
        exact hb
    exact h_inj
  · -- Show F is surjective
    intro B
    use { a | f a ∈ B }
    ext v
    simp at *
    <;> aesop
    <;> tauto
    <;> aesop
    <;> tauto
    <;> aesop
    <;> tauto
    <;> aesop
    <;> tauto
    <;> aesop
    <;> tauto

by 
  rcases h with ⟨f, g, h1, h2⟩
  use f, g
  constructor
  · -- Show that f is injective on sets
    intro A B hAB
    have h3 : ∀ v : V, v ∈ f '' A ↔ v ∈ f '' B := by
      simp [hAB]
    have h4 : ∀ u : U, u ∈ A ↔ u ∈ B := by
      intro u
      have h5 : f u ∈ f '' A ↔ f u ∈ f '' B := h3 (f u)
      simp at h5 ⊢
      all_goals try tauto
    ext u
    exact h4 u
  · -- Show that f is surjective on sets
    intro A
    use g '' A
    ext v
    simp
    constructor
    · -- Assume v ∈ f(g(A))
      rintro ⟨u, hu, hfu⟩
      have h1' : g u ∈ A := hu
      have h2' : f (g u) = u := by
        simpa using congr_fun h1 u
      have h3' : f u = v := hfu
      tauto
    · -- Assume v ∈ A
      intro hv
      use g v
      constructor
      · -- Show that g(v) ∈ g(A)
        have h4 : v ∈ A := hv
        simp at *
        all_goals try tauto
      · -- Show that f(g(v)) = v
        have h6 : f (g v) = v := by
          simpa using congr_fun h1 v
        exact h6

by
  rcases h with ⟨f, g, h1, h2⟩
  use (fun s => {f x | x ∈ s}), (fun t => {g x | x ∈ t})
  constructor
  · -- Show that G ∘ F = id
    funext s
    ext x
    simp [h1]
    <;> aesop
  · -- Show that F ∘ G = id
    funext t
    ext x
    simp [h2]
    <;> aesop

by
  rcases h with ⟨f, g, hf, hg⟩
  use f, g
  constructor
  · -- Show that f is injective on sets
    intro s₁ s₂ h_eq
    have h1 : g '' (f '' s₁) = s₁ := by
      ext x
      simp [Function.comp_apply, hg]
    have h2 : g '' (f '' s₂) = s₂ := by
      ext x
      simp [Function.comp_apply, hg]
    have h3 : g '' (f '' s₁) = g '' (f '' s₂) := by
      rw [h_eq]
    rw [h1] at h3
    rw [h2] at h3
    exact h3
  · -- Show that f is surjective on sets
    intro t
    use g '' t
    ext y
    simp [Function.comp_apply, hf]
    <;> aesop

by
  rcases h with ⟨f, g, h1, h2⟩
  use (fun s => f '' s), (fun t => g '' t)
  all_goals
    simp_all [Set.mem_image, Set.mem_setOf_eq, Function.comp_apply]
    <;> aesop

by
  obtain ⟨f, hf, hfinv⟩ := h
  use f.image
  constructor
  · -- Show that image f is injective
    intro A B h_eq
    ext x
    simp [Set.mem_image, Set.mem_setOf_eq] at h_eq ⊢
    constructor
    · -- Assume x ∈ A
      intro hx
      rcases hx with ⟨y, hy, hxy⟩
      have h1 : x ∈ image f B := by
        rw [h_eq] at *
        exact hxy
      rcases h1 with ⟨z, hz, hxz⟩
      have h2 : f y = f z := by
        linarith [hxy, hxz]
      have h3 : y = z := by
        apply f.injective
        linarith
      have h4 : y ∈ B := by
        rw [show z = y by linarith [h3]] at hz
        exact hz
      tauto
    · -- Assume x ∈ B
      intro hx
      rcases hx with ⟨y, hy, hxy⟩
      have h1 : x ∈ image f A := by
        rw [h_eq] at *
        exact hxy
      rcases h1 with ⟨z, hz, hxz⟩
      have h2 : f y = f z := by
        linarith [hxy, hxz]
      have h3 : y = z := by
        apply f.injective
        linarith
      have h4 : y ∈ A := by
        rw [show z = y by linarith [h3]] at hz
        exact hz
      tauto
  · -- Show that image f is surjective
    intro C
    use f⁻¹ '' C
    ext x
    simp [Set.mem_image, Set.mem_setOf_eq, Set.mem_preimage]
    <;> tauto
